name: revenue-operations
description: Revenue Operations (RevOps) specialist team — 4 agents covering the lead-to-cash funnel: revops-lead (operating model, GTM data model, RevOps maturity), crm-operations-architect (CRM-as-process, object/stage model, data hygiene, dedupe, single source of truth), sales-comp-and-territory-analyst (quota setting, territory design, comp plan design, capacity planning), pipeline-forecast-engineer (stage exit-criteria, forecast methodology, coverage/velocity, pipeline integrity). Ships 3 skills (pipeline-hygiene-and-stage-definitions, forecasting-methodology, comp-and-territory-design), 3 commands, 2 templates, decision-tree knowledge bank, 6 best-practices, an advisory hook, and a stdlib calculator. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols (Grounding, Structured Output).
